hero_title_1: Relive the memories of the Silk Caravans
hero_title_2: And relax in an oasis of history
hero_desc: In the heart of Palmyra, where the sands whisper the stories of ancestors, we await you to write a new chapter of comfort and tranquility.
about_title: The Story of Silk Road Lodge
about_desc: In the heart of the Palmyra desert, where the sands of time embrace tales of antiquity, the 'Silk Road Lodge' emerges as an oasis where the spirit of the past is poured into the molds of the present. We are not just a destination for accommodation, but a gateway that takes you through the ancient caravans that roamed the earth to make Palmyra a beacon of beauty and human exchange. Every stone in our courtyard tells the story of the pillars' resilience, and every corner in our corridors beats with a tranquility interrupted only by the rustle of the gentle Syrian breeze. When you choose to stay with us, you do not just rent a room; you host history in a dwelling that blends the precision of heritage design with the warmth of authentic Syrian hospitality.
home_about_title: The Story of the Silk Road
home_about_desc: At the Silk Road Lodge, we don't just offer rooms to sleep in; we offer an experience to travel back in time. Every corner of our hotel tells a story from the ancient tales of Palmyra.
footer_address: Orientals Street, 100 meters from the Palmyra Museum, Palmyra (Tadmur), Homs Governorate, Syria.
footer_copyright: All rights reserved to Silk Road Lodge
services_subtitle: Accompanying you on an authentic hospitality journey inspired by the magic of the East along the historic Silk Road
bedouin_tent_description: Experience authentic Arabic hospitality in our heritage-styled Bedouin tent, featuring aromatic Arabic coffee and cultural gatherings.
safari_tour_title: Camel and horse rides in the archaeological area and orchards
safari_tour_description: An unforgettable historic tour on camels and purebred Arabian horses to explore the surrounding archeological sites and lush orchards.
bicycles_description: Enjoy a refreshing ride and explore the nature surrounding the lodge freely with our available modern bicycles.
airport_pickup_description: Your comfort is our priority. We provide premium, secure round-the-clock airport pick-up and drop-off services.
syria_tour_description: Comprehensive tourist itineraries accompanied by professional guides to visit the most famous historical landmarks, ancient souks, and citadels.
rooms_subtitle: Meticulously designed spaces tailored to ensure peace and absolute comfort for individuals and families along the Silk Road
single_room_desc: A peaceful and cozy retreat mindfully crafted for one person, offering complete privacy and a lovely view.
double_room_desc: A spacious room ideal for two guests, featuring one large double bed for a perfect night's rest.
twin_room_desc: Comfortable accommodation for two guests, equipped with two separate single beds to provide convenience and privacy.
triple_room_desc: An excellent choice for small groups and families, accommodating three guests with three separate beds.
quad_room_desc: A generous family-style room that comfortably accommodates four guests, outfitted with four separate beds.
not_found_title: Oops! This gateway no longer exists.
not_found_desc: It seems you have lost your way while wandering through the hotel corridors. Don't worry, you can return to our main oasis with a single click.
loading: Preparing the oasis and fetching data...
error_rooms: We couldn't retrieve the room details from our oasis at the moment. Please try again later.
booking_subtitle: Discover heritage and luxury at the Silk Road Hotel
notes_placeholder: Any requirements regarding bedding, smoking preferences, or early arrival...
booking_success_desc: Thank you for choosing the Silk Road Hotel. Your reservation is secured, and the confirmation details will be sent to your email shortly.
error_rooms_sorry: We were unable to fetch room data from our oasis at this time. Please try again.
